notes: Census derived from current database statistics (5,775 legal documents, 142,743 provisions).
Source: Justel / Belgisch Staatsblad / Moniteur belge — Belgian official consolidated legislation.
Bilingual corpus: French (FR) and Dutch (NL) provisions.
Coverage: Belgian federal cybersecurity and data protection legislation scope.
Per-law provision counts available at runtime via the 'about' tool.
Full per-law census entries will be populated on next database rebuild with census extraction enabled.
